notes: SHIP v1.14.311 - two post-.310 fixes + the --teal :root fix (owner 'yes ship .311 and add the --teal fix'). Surgical str_replace edits (NOT a wholesale bundle). (1) FIXED invalid CSS `#pg-cmd .stat.cc-tap:active{...filter:none brightness(1.18)}` -> `filter:brightness(1.18)`: this was a find-replace artifact in the .310 bundle (its global filter:saturate(1.40)->filter:none swap caught this :active rule and left `none brightness(1.18)`, which does not parse -> the press-brightness on that Crash-Cart stat tile silently dropped). (2) ADDED `--teal:#1fffd0` to the main :root (primitive brand colors block, after --gold): --teal was UNDEFINED on :root (it lived ONLY under #boot L11248 / #forge3d-sheet L8867, neither an ancestor of #pg-cmd), so `#pg-cmd .tile.hot-teal` (the SCANNED tile, toggled live by cmd_telemetry once a scan happens today) + the SHARED platform card built --tc/--rfac from an invalid var(--teal) -> invalid-at-computed-value -> the tile's glass HOUSING collapsed (background transparent, box-shadow none). Canonical Design-Law-5 / channel-'complete' value #1fffd0; can only fix the broken var() references, cannot break anything (nothing relied on it being undefined; #boot/#forge3d local defs still win in their scopes). (3) version.json notes corrected (the .310 bundle shipped with STALE notes still describing .305). FOR THE RECORD, .310 (commit 4899d44) = surface OBSIDIAN fill (linear-gradient 158deg near-black) on all surfaces + .292 rings de-colored to neutral slate + the Command LENS as the sole colored edge (2px solid aqua #1BFFE4) + a --glow-hue/--glow-a/--glow-inner single-source glow system (glow off by default) on the body.rd tier. Gates: braces 11802/11802 UNCHANGED (no brace-touching edits), node --check sw.js OK, version triple .310->.311 lockstep, CRLF preserved, ?legacy=1 byte-identical (all three edits are on :root / a #pg-cmd rule / the app const, none reach the legacy tree). DEVICE-VERIFY (John): SCANNED tile keeps its glass housing after a scan (no collapse to transparent); the cc-tap stat still brightens on press; .310 surfaces unchanged. NEXT: N-11 Work Active-Workspace (recon done, awaiting go + RESUME-route call).
